title: Realistic Minecraft Backrooms
description: 🕯️ Realistic Minecraft Backrooms 🏢, hear every echo 🎧, and survive the endless horror 😱. Dive into the ultimate Backrooms experience today! 🌌
body:
![titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/413c2bf4bf5197f3be97a87f5772f681a23ae414.png)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

<details>
<summary>🪜 Levels</summary>

Level 0 ----- The Backrooms

Level 1 ----- The Habitable Zone

Level 2 ----- Pipe Dreams

Level 3 ----- The Poolrooms

Level 4 ----- Grass fields

</details>

<details>
<summary>👨‍💻Commands</summary>
  
/skinwalker <target> (Spawn Skinwalker)
  
/release <target> (Releases the target from the skinwalker if the target has had their skin stolen)

/backroomsevent <event> (Manually triggers an event)
  
/gimmemyinventoryback <target> (Restores the saved inventory of the specified targets from before they entered the Backrooms)
  
/level <level> (Manually teleport yourself to a certain level)


</details>

---

Welcome to the endless halls of the Realistic Backrooms!
Experience Minecraft like never before – dark, eerie, and frighteningly realistic.
Are you ready to get lost in a chilling world where escape and survival mean everything?

---

**📷 Media**

---

<details>
<summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>


**🏢 Endless Backrooms**

**🎥 Found Footage Atmosphere**

**🎧 Realistic Sound**

**⚙️ Enhanced Controls and QoL**

**🗣️ Voice Chat**

**✨ Stable and Powerful**

</details>


<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

Horror and Backrooms fans seeking maximum immersion

Survival players craving intense thrills

Sound design enthusiasts wanting a lifelike atmosphere

</details>



<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>


Built for Minecraft 1.20.1 with Fabric Loader.

---

**do not use Shaders**

</details>



---

Ready for a journey with no way out?
Dive into the Realistic Backrooms now!
